name: Fusilli with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Ripe Plum Tomatoes, diced OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 2 tablespoons Olive Oil on one small plate and 3 tablespoons Parmesan on another.
2. Dip one side of each zucchini slice in oil, then sprinkle with Parmesan.
3. Arrange the cheese side up on a broiler pan.
4. In a bowl, combine diced tomatoes, chopped parsley, basil, shallots, minced garlic, marjoram, salt, and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
5. Preheat the broiler.
6. Cook the fusilli or other short pasta until just tender but firm to the bite. Rinse with cold water and drain.
7. Add the pasta to the tomato mixture. Mix in 1/4 cup broth and lemon juice.
8. Broil the zucchini, about 5 inches from the heat source, until bubbly and golden brown. This should take about 3 minutes.
9. Add the zucchini to the pasta and toss.
10. Garnish with basil leaves and sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese.
11. Serve at room temperature.
